notes:
Cameras streaming through the savant app for projects in South Africa take minutes to load. Dahua and Hikvision. Wait times are not acceptable. We need to figure out if feeds are going via US servers. Or what causes the delay. 
This is a permanent problem. Find out if there are settings that are incorrect on our side. Or what caused the issue.

name: Email Herman and Herman
notes:
Hi Herman


The SVS actually has more power and can achieve deeper bass than the M&K.

So we'll go with that option. 

We will replace the in-ceiling speakers with C3's which are 3-way and have a bigger bass driver. 

We'll replace the TV sub with an SVS in-wall sub. Much more power and depth. We just did one for a Malan Vorster client in Cape Town. It works well. 

We'll get 2x 17' SVS subs for the East and West wings. We can set them up and decide if each wing need 2, or if one each will do. 

We'll buy back the equipment that we replace. 

Please see quote and invoice attached.
